meaning: n.[电信]发给有执照的业余无线电操作人员的通用信号
examples: Objective: The diagnostic value of quantitative sensory test (QST) on headaches has been observed.
Quantitative Sensory Testing (QST) has been used to detect and characterize sensation alteration in human being.
Objective To test the threshold and significance of quantitative sensory testing (QST) of hands in normal subjects.
